fivetran.name: FIVETRAN
fivetran.comment: Fivetran connector identity - writes/alters SALESFORCE_RAW_FIVETRAN only

ingest.name: INGEST
ingest.comment: Python ADLS telemetry loader - DML on PRODUCT_EVENTS_RAW_ADLS only (platform owns the DDL)

dbt_hub.comment: dbt HUB project (platform staging) - reads RAW; owns STAGING

dbt_revops.name: DBT_REVOPS
dbt_revops.comment: dbt RevOps SPOKE project - reads hub STAGING; owns MARTS_REVOPS + REVOPS_DEV
